div1.entryFree: Tapestry, woven hangings: the desk that's covered o'er with Turkish t. Err. IV, 1, 104. the shaven Hercules in the smirched worm-eaten t. Ado III, 3, 146. my hangings all of Tyrian t. Shr. II, 351. to pawn the t. of my dining-chambers, H4B II, 1, 154. 159 (--es). hanged with t. of silk and silver, Cymb. II, 4, 69.
